summary: NEXUS AI v4.3 Testing Complete - All 22 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. New features verified: OpenClaw integration, 11 integrations, comprehensive AIxploria scan, ElevenLabs/Fal.ai demo modes.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_nexus_v4_3.py - Created v4.3 test suite with 22 tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: v4.3 features fully tested and verified working. OpenClaw endpoints return status and analysis suggestions. Integration status now shows 11 integrations (was 8 in v4.2). AIxploria comprehensive scan accepts ?comprehensive=true parameter for 50+ categories. ElevenLabs and Fal.ai services return demo mode responses when API keys not configured. All v4.2 features continue to work (no regression).

v43_features_verified.openclaw_status_endpoint: GET /api/admin/openclaw/status returns installation status, capabilities, and recommendations
v43_features_verified.openclaw_analysis_endpoint: GET /api/admin/openclaw/analysis returns 4 platform improvement suggestions with priority, impact, effort
v43_features_verified.openclaw_ui_tab: OpenClaw tab visible in Automation Panel with status card and suggestions list
v43_features_verified.integration_count_11: Integration status API returns 11 integrations (emergent_llm, stripe, resend, github, gitlab, producthunt, manus, softr, elevenlabs, fal_ai, openclaw)
v43_features_verified.elevenlabs_integration: ElevenLabs Voice integration present with demo mode behavior
v43_features_verified.fal_ai_integration: Fal.ai Images integration present with demo mode behavior
v43_features_verified.aixploria_comprehensive_scan: Comprehensive scan parameter accepted, UI shows 'Comprehensive (All 50+ categories)' checkbox
v43_features_verified.aixploria_stats: Stats show 11 total scans, 35 total tools, 5 critical, 21 high priority
v43_features_verified.homepage_11_agents: Homepage stats show '11 AI Agents Active'
v43_features_verified.ai_agents_dashboard: AI Agents page shows 11 agents with 'All Systems Active' status

mocked_apis_confirmed: Resend - logs to console when key is demo_placeholder
ElevenLabs - returns demo response with mocked=true when API key not configured
Fal.ai - returns demo response with mocked=true when API key not configured
GitLab - returns mock project data without token
ProductHunt - skipped during scans without key
Manus AI - returns mock task IDs without key
Softr - web scraping mode without API key
OpenClaw - returns status based on /app/openclaw_agent directory existence
integration_health_score: 18% (2/11 active - Emergent LLM Key and Stripe)
